Premium Checking.description: Premium Checking requires a $2,500 minimum daily balance. Falling below incurs a $25 monthly maintenance fee.

Standard Checking.description: Standard Checking requires a $500 minimum daily balance. Falling below incurs a $12 monthly maintenance fee.

Savings.description: Savings accounts require a $300 minimum balance. Falling below incurs a $5 monthly fee.

overdraft_policy.description: Overdraft fee is $35 per transaction. Linking a savings account provides automatic overdraft protection.
